description: The four decode functions pull the right 2-bit field, and execute reads srcA/srcB, runs the ALU, and stores into dest
Each field is extracted with the right shift amount and a & 3 mask (opcode>>6, dest>>4, srcA>>2, srcB no shift)
execute copies the register list and updates only the dest slot — it does not mutate the input or rebuild it wrong
execute calls alu rather than re-implementing arithmetic
